title: 你好，世界！
content: 欢迎使用 Chiakya : Home 这个我精心打造的 欢乐小窝！希望能在接下来的旅途中与您相伴，共同创造出更多难以忘怀的美好体验。

[{"id":"weekly-1","mode":"weekly","title":"单身男女的效率恋爱","description":"示例简介：职场男女在高压节奏里摸索亲密关系的边界。","type":"japanese","dayOfWeek":[1,4],"startDate":"2026-03-01","endDate":"2026-05-31"},{"id":"weekly-2","mode":"weekly","title":"灿烂的一天","description":"示例简介：小镇青年与城市生活碰撞后的成长故事。","type":"korean","dayOfWeek":[3]},{"id":"range-1","mode":"range","title":"琢玉","description":"示例简介：围绕杀猪高手和侯爷的真假博弈与人心较量。","type":"chinese","startDate":"2026-03-10","endDate":"2026-04-06"}]

title: 追番追剧日历
content: #anime-calendar-app .calendar-table td { height: 120px; width: 14.2857%; vertical-align: top; } #anime-calendar-app .calendar-item { cursor: pointer; } #anime-calendar-app .acw-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; display: none; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25); z-index: 9999; padding: 16px; } #anime-calendar-app .acw-overlay.is-open { display: flex; } #anime-calendar-app .acw-overlay-card { background: #fff; color: #333; max-width: 520px; width: 100%; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px 18px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; white-space: pre-line; } 追番追剧日历 记录和管理你正在追的日剧、韩剧和动漫 上个月 下个月 日剧/动漫 韩剧 国产剧 剧集配置 请在 source/anime-calendar/data.json 内编辑剧集配置，页面会自动读取并渲染。 var currentYear = new Date().getFullYear(); var currentMonth = new Date().getMonth(); var animeList = []; function initCalendar() { loadAnimeList(); renderCalendar(); renderCurrentMonth(); document.getElementById('prev-month').onclick = function() { changeMonth(-1); }; document.getElementById('next-month').onclick = function() { changeMonth(1); }; bindOverlayClose(); } function bindOverlayClose() { var overlay = document.querySelector('[data-acw-overlay]'); var card = document.querySelector('[data-acw-overlay-card]'); if (!overlay || !card) return; overlay.onclick = function(event) { if (event.target === overlay) { closeOverlay(); } }; } function loadAnimeList() { fetch('data.json') .then(function(response) { if (!response.ok) throw new Error('加载失败'); return response.json(); }) .then(function(data) { animeList = Array.isArray(data) ? data : []; renderCalendar(); }) .catch(function(error) { console.error(error); animeList = []; renderCalendar(); }); } function renderCurrentMonth() { var monthNames = ['1月', '2月', '3月', '4月', '5月', '6月', '7月', '8月', '9月', '10月', '11月', '12月']; document.getElementById('current-month').innerHTML = currentYear + '年' + monthNames[currentMonth]; } function renderCalendar() { var container = document.getElementById('calendar-container'); if (!container) return; var html = ''; html += ''; var weekdays = ['周日', '周一', '周二', '周三', '周四', '周五', '周六']; for (var i = 0; i < weekdays.length; i++) { html += '' + weekdays[i] + ''; } html += ''; html += ''; var firstDay = new Date(currentYear, currentMonth, 1); var lastDay = new Date(currentYear, currentMonth + 1, 0); var startDayOfWeek = firstDay.getDay(); var prevMonthLastDay = new Date(currentYear, currentMonth, 0).getDate(); var dayCount = 1; var nextMonthDay = 1; var today = new Date(); for (var week = 0; week < 6; week++) { html += ''; for (var dayOfWeek = 0; dayOfWeek < 7; dayOfWeek++) { var cellIndex = week * 7 + dayOfWeek; if (cellIndex < startDayOfWeek) { var day = prevMonthLastDay - startDayOfWeek + cellIndex + 1; html += ''; html += '' + day + ''; html += ''; } else if (dayCount

(function() { function getAnimesForDate(date, list) { var dateStr = formatDate(date); var dayOfWeek = date.getDay(); var result = []; for (var i = 0; i < list.length; i++) { var anime = list[i]; if (anime.mode === 'weekly') { var weeklyDays = Array.isArray(anime.dayOfWeek) ? anime.dayOfWeek : [anime.dayOfWeek]; if (weeklyDays.indexOf(dayOfWeek) === -1) continue; if (anime.startDate && dateStr < anime.startDate) continue; if (anime.endDate && dateStr > anime.endDate) continue; result.push(anime); } else if (anime.mode === 'range') { if (dateStr >= anime.startDate && dateStr

title: 链接列表（样例）
content: (() => { const flist = [{"title":"Hexo","description":"快速、简洁且高效的博客框架","image":"","link":""},{"title":"Chiakya : Home","description":"一个独属于竹竹Chiakya的小窝","image":"","link":""},{"title":"本地图片","description":"可以使用本地资源作为链接的图片","image":"/images/user.svg","link":"/"},{"title":"新标签页","description":"所有链接会在新标签页中打开","image":"/images/user.svg","link":"/"}]; let friendNodes = ''; while (flist.length > 0) { const randID = Math.floor(Math.random()*flist.length); friendNodes += ` ${flist[randID].title} ${flist[randID].description} `; flist.splice(randID, 1); } document.currentScript.parentNode.querySelector(".kr-linklist-container").innerHTML = friendNodes; })(); 调整内容 可以通过修改 source/_data/linklist.yml 文件中的内容来调整这里的内容。 具体的使用方法可以参见 文档站 中的 标签组件 和 链接列表 部分。
